description: Vercel is a cloud platform for static sites and serverless functions, enabling developers to deploy front‑end projects with instant rollbacks and global CDN delivery.
authentication: Supports OAuth via Git providers (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket), email/password, and single sign‑on (SSO) for teams.
self_serve: Yes – users can sign up, connect a repository, and deploy projects directly from the dashboard without requiring a sales or support interaction.
api_surface: Provides a RESTful API for creating, updating, and deleting projects, deployments, and environments, as well as a GraphQL endpoint for advanced queries.
buildability: Supports a wide range of frameworks (Next.js, React, Vue, Angular, Svelte, etc.) and custom build settings via vercel.json or project configuration.
main_blocker: Limited to Git-based workflows; projects must be connected to a supported Git provider for automated deployments.
